name: testclaw
description: TestClaw is an open-source AI testing platform for QA teams.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @testclaw/api & npm run dev --workspace @testclaw/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @testclaw/api && npm run build --workspace @testclaw/web
scripts.check: npm run check --workspace @testclaw/api && npm run check --workspace @testclaw/web
